title: erigeron subalpinus
intro: Erigeron subalpinus, also known as Alpine Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erigeron subalpinus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Erigeron subalpinus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and relieve symptoms of respiratory infections.
